backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor defining product catalog, cart, wishlist, reviews, and orders with CRUD operations for an e-commerce store selling nuts, dry fruits, and seeds.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: footer contact info update and WhatsApp button phone number integration, both with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the React application structure, components, pages, hooks, and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and custom CSS variables defining OKLCH color system for light and dark modes with brand-specific design tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag, title 'AR NUTS', and script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, products, cart, wishlist, and checkout pages, wrapped in a layout with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/BestSellers.tsx: Component displaying the first 8 products in a 4-column grid as best sellers section with loading skeletons.
Category browsing section with three clickable cards (Nuts, Dry Fruits, Seeds) that navigate to filtered product pages.
Reviews section displaying up to 3 customer reviews with star ratings, falling back to sample reviews if none exist.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProducts: Component displaying the first 6 products in a 3-column grid as featured products section with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with AR NUTS branding, contact info (phone: +91 93452 85169, email: arnutssnacks@gmail.com), Instagram link, policy links, and Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component with logo, search bar, wishlist and cart icons displaying item counts, and navigation using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/HeroBanner.tsx: Hero banner section with background image, gradient overlay, and call-to-action button promoting premium nuts and dry fruits.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card component displaying product image, details, weight selector, and buttons to add to cart/wishlist with stock status handling.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppOrderBut: Button component that formats cart items into a WhatsApp message and opens WhatsApp with pre-filled order details to a hardcoded phone number.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Marketing section displaying three benefit cards (Fresh Stock, Affordable Price, Fast Delivery) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for products, cart, wishlist, and reviews with CRUD operations using the backend actor, including category filtering and search functionality.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, including color schemes for UI components and custom brand colors (gold and brown).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with product details, quantities, prices, and options to clear cart or proceed to checkout via WhatsApp.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with delivery information form that collects customer details and displays order summary with WhatsApp order submission option.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page composing multiple sections including hero banner, categories, featured products, best sellers, customer reviews, and why-choose-us.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Product listing page with filtering by category, price range, and weight options, supporting search functionality and displaying filtered product cards.
frontend/src/pages/WishlistPage.tsx: Wishlist page showing saved products with options to move items to cart or remove them, with empty state handling.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, container settings, border radius, animations (accordion), custom font family (Inter), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting AR NUTS e-commerce website with schema version 1.0.0, architectural notes for mobile-first design with gold/brown accents, and a comprehensive list of existing features including hero banner, category browsing, product listing, filtering, cart, wishlist, and various homepage sections.
